'''Shappa Farrs''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ferroan]] living on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] as of [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. His wife was [[Sheekla Farrs|Sheekla]]. He helped introduce clients to their prospective [[seed-partner]]s and to design their [[Sekotan Personal Starship|Sekotan vessels]]. He was short, slender and had [[black]] hair and prominent cheekbones. He lost his right [[Limb/Legends|arm]], as well as two fingers on his left hand, while forging and shaping Sekotan ships; however, this did little to prevent him from his current assignment, which he pursued with great zeal.<ref name="RP" />

While he and his wife were gravely injured in the [[First Battle of Zonama Sekot]], they both recovered before the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="RP" />
